 Philip,
 
 I agree with the patch. This piece of code is left from the old
 "devel/boost" port. At present boost-libs never installs Boost.Python. There
 is "devel/boost-python-libs" for that.
 
 Alexander Churanov,
 maintainer of devel/boost-*
